description_long: A male construction worker stands upright with arms extended horizontally, wearing light blue denim overalls over a white short-sleeve shirt. He has a distinctive ginger beard and a mohawk hairstyle, with his facial features clearly defined. The overalls are loose-fitting and feature visible seams and pockets, typical of workwear designed for durability. His footwear consists of sturdy black work boots, suitable for construction environments. The figure's build is robust, with muscular arms and a broad chest, suggesting physical strength. No safety helmet, reflective vest, or tool belt is present, emphasizing a casual work attire rather than full safety gear.
description: A bearded male construction worker in blue overalls, white shirt, and black work boots, with a mohawk hairstyle and no safety gear.
description_view_0: Front view shows the worker's face, beard, mohawk, white shirt, blue overalls, and black boots.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, beard, arm, and the side seam of the overalls.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, overalls' straps, and the full length of the overalls and boots.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, arm, and side of the overalls.
